caribbean.headline: Caribbean Winds Rise
caribbean.paragraph: Grand Cayman is experiencing 19 kt winds with 6.6 ft wave heights and a 61% rain probability, while St. Maarten is seeing 23 kt winds, making for a notable day in the Caribbean. I expect these conditions to impact cruise ship operations in both the Western and Eastern Caribbean, particularly in ports such as Grand Cayman and St. Maarten.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Sees Calm Seas
mediterranean.paragraph: Lisbon is experiencing a less than 10% rain probability with winds at 12 kt and wave heights reaching 3.1 ft. Cadiz has a less than 10% rain probability with winds at 0 kt, making for a generally calm day in the Western Mediterranean ports.
